scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @sentinel/security-core && npm run build -w @sentinel/evidence-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/attack-path-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/policy-engine && npm run build -w @sentinel/ai-intelligence && npm run build -w @sentinel/enterprise-core && npm run build -w @sentinel/posture-intelligence && npm run build -w @sentinel/plugin-sdk && npm run build -w @sentinel/db && npm run build -w @sentinel/scanner-runner
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @sentinel/web && npm run build -w @sentinel/worker
scripts.test: npm-run-all test:core test:evidence test:attack-path test:policy test:intelligence test:enterprise test:posture test:scanner test:worker test:web
scripts.typecheck: npm-run-all typecheck:web typecheck:worker typecheck:core typecheck:evidence typecheck:attack-path typecheck:policy typecheck:intelligence typecheck:enterprise typecheck:posture typecheck:db typecheck:scanner typecheck:plugin-sdk
scripts.verify: npm run verify:static && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
